items.text:
I was so careful, for so long.
I was careful, I was careful,
I was careful, I was careful, then ...

One day I woke up at 3 in the morning,
full of energy, yearning to just do it all.

items.comment: Todo: "this has been enough careful" can be replaced by the "making me old" line, for brevity?
items.text:
Thinking, this has been enough careful and
it's time to just leap ahead.
All this time being careful is making me old!

I was working feverishly,
half-asleep, blearily...

No surprise, -- a mistake.
The stone was vibrating with power,
and, I dropped it --

items.comment: Todo: Maybe just "piercing me" and something to add a little at the end.
items.text:
exploding,
tiny fragments of darklith flying,
piercing my body --
and thus, I am as I am today.
